falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish breakout contradicting the consolidation phase implied by the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 30-day average on a single day with a price surge >15%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates a blowoff top scenario invalidating the pattern's bottom formation characteristics

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 55 with concurrent RSI >75 on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms extreme overbought conditions contradicting the pattern's expected consolidation behavior

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
